title: ModelRuntime module scaffolding + Cargo workspace deps
goal: Create the model_runtime/ module root in handshake_core with public mod.rs, error.rs, capabilities.rs scaffolding plus the Cargo.toml workspace dependency additions for llama-cpp-2 and candle-core + candle-transformers. This is the foundation MT every C.* MT depends on; gets the crate compiling against new deps before any runtime code lands.
expected_diff_shape: New directory src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/ with mod.rs (empty pub trait/struct stubs declared), error.rs (ModelRuntimeError enum), capabilities.rs (ModelCapabilities struct stub); src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml workspace deps additions; lib.rs adds `pub mod model_runtime;`.
unblock_conditions: No prerequisites; foundation MT for cluster C.
implementation_notes: Per spec §4.6.1 (AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT) the ModelRuntime trait surface MUST be engine-agnostic (callers never see llama_cpp_2::* or candle_core::* types). This MT does NOT implement the trait yet (MT-062 does) — it lands the module scaffolding and dependency edges so subsequent MTs compile incrementally. Cargo.toml additions: `llama-cpp-2 = "0.1"` (pin a current 2026 version; latest stable as of 2026-05 supports per-request --lora and KV quant), `candle-core = "0.7"`, `candle-transformers = "0.7"` (candle 0.7+ has Mamba2 + RWKV v5/v6/v7 support), `tokenizers = "0.20"` (Hugging Face tokenizers crate; needed by both runtimes), `futures = "0.3"` for the streaming generate signature, `async-trait = "0.1"` for trait method async (MT-062), `tokio = { version = "1", features = ["sync", "rt", "macros"] }` if not already present. `ModelRuntimeError` enum variants: `LoadError(String)`, `UnloadError(String)`, `GenerateError(String)`, `ScoreError(String)`, `EmbedError(String)`, `CapabilityNotSupported { capability: String, adapter: String }`, `KvCacheError(String)`, `LoraStackError(String)`, `SteeringHookError(String)`, `Cancelled`, `AdapterMismatch { expected: String, got: String }`. Use thiserror::Error derive. `ModelCapabilities` struct fields exactly per AC-MODEL-CAP-DECL: `supports_lora: bool`, `supports_kv_prefix_cache: bool`, `supports_kv_quantization: KvQuantSupport (enum: None|Q4|Q8|Q4Q8Mix)`, `supports_activation_steering: bool`, `supports_subquadratic: bool`, `supports_speculative_draft: bool`, `supports_eagle3: bool`. Derive serde::{Serialize, Deserialize}. lib.rs gets `pub mod model_runtime;` line. Verify `cargo build -p handshake_core` succeeds with empty scaffolding (no orphan dep warnings). UUID v7 per HBR-INT-008 will be used in MT-062 when ModelId is minted.
risk_if_missed: Cluster C cannot compile incrementally; subsequent MTs hit dependency-resolution churn.
validator_focus: Cargo.toml additions pin compatible versions; module compiles with empty stubs; no unused-import warnings; lib.rs cleanly exports the module.

minimum_controls: llama-cpp-2 + candle versions must build clean on Windows host (no Linux-only feature flags pulled in).
Engine-specific types never leak through model_runtime::mod.rs public surface (verify by grep for llama_cpp_2:: and candle_core:: in module).
ModelCapabilities struct field names exact-match AC-MODEL-CAP-DECL (frontend IPC consumers depend on stable names).
